name: enrich-waterfall
description: Cheapest-first B2B enrichment waterfall via the SELAT Router (MPP) plus one direct Circle x402 call. Resolves a person and anchors their company with sub-cent calls first, layers in company signals / social, escalates to premium contact reveals (Clado contacts, Clado natural-language people search) only on gaps, and verifies the email last. 20 deduplicated steps across Apollo, Hunter, Clado, Brave Search, Diffbot KG and Abstract Company Enrichment (via Locus), StableSocial (MPP direct merchant), and AIsa (Circle x402 catalog).

email.description: Person work email (primary resolve key for Hunter email/combined enrichment and Apollo people enrichment).

name.description: Full name; also used as the social handle for the AIsa X/Twitter profile, StableSocial Instagram/TikTok profile, and Clado handle-to-person search steps.

firstName.description: First name; used by the Hunter email-finder and Apollo people-enrichment calls.

lastName.description: Last name; paired with firstName + domain for the email-finder and people-enrichment calls.

domain.description: Company domain (e.g. stripe.com); primary key for the Abstract lookup, Apollo org-enrichment, Hunter company-enrichment and email-finder calls.

company.description: Company name; fallback anchor via Apollo org-search when no domain, and the query seed for Brave news/funding search and Diffbot KG enhance.

linkedinUrl.description: Person or company LinkedIn URL; used by the Clado linkedin-profile, contacts and scrape calls (JSON body, no path encoding needed).

organizationId.description: Apollo organization id for the job-postings signals step; replace the placeholder default with the id returned by the Apollo org-enrichment / org-search anchor steps (the gateway serves no 402 challenge for an empty id).

steps.label: person resolve — Apollo people enrichment (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
person resolve by email — Hunter email enrichment (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
person resolve by LinkedIn URL — Clado LinkedIn profile (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
person+company resolve by email — Hunter combined enrichment (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
company anchor (no domain) — Apollo org search by name (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
company anchor — Abstract Company Enrichment lookup by domain (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
company anchor + tech + headcount — Apollo org enrichment by domain (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
company anchor — Hunter company enrichment by domain (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
email find by name — Hunter email-finder (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
X/Twitter profile — AIsa user info (Circle x402 catalog; DIRECT, Circle Gateway-batched)
LinkedIn person/company posts — Clado scrape (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
Instagram profile — StableSocial (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
TikTok profile — StableSocial (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
job openings / hiring signals — Apollo job postings by org id (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
news events — Brave news search for company (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
financing events — Brave news search for funding rounds (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
business connections / KG record — Diffbot Knowledge Graph enhance (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
contact reveal (email + phone) from LinkedIn — Clado contacts (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
person search by handle / natural language — Clado search (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
email verify — Hunter email-verifier (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
